issues.detail: Skill covers happy path but lacks coverage of all error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Articles CRUD module with JWT-guarded create
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces idiomatic NestJS code but often skips ParseIntPipe, class-validator decorators in DTO, or InjectRepository in the service; treatment matches the SKILL.md pattern exactly including @UseGuards(AuthGuard) on create and NotFoundException in service.

scenarios.name: Bootstrap with ValidationPipe whitelist + TypeORM Postgres
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to enable the global ValidationPipe but omits whitelist/transform pair, autoLoadEntities, or the NODE_ENV gate on synchronize; treatment uses the exact main.ts and AppModule patterns from the SKILL.md.
